## Summary

Describe the question, correction, or maintenance change and why it is needed.

## Evidence and scope

- Affected page, claim, and source IDs:
- Source versions and precise locators checked:
- Jurisdictions, systems, populations, or dates to which the change applies:
- Important limits, conflicts, or unavailable material:

## Checklist

- [ ] I searched existing pages, IDs, titles, URLs, and DOIs before adding a
      page or source.
- [ ] Material externally verifiable claims route to an underlying `SRC` page
      and a precise source locator.
- [ ] I distinguished observations, source reports, analytic judgments,
      hypotheses, incidents, and scenarios.
- [ ] I preserved issued IDs, uncertainty, additional frontmatter, and all
      `human-note` content.
- [ ] Relative Markdown links work on GitHub and in an ordinary Markdown
      reader.
- [ ] I did not edit, normalize, rename, move, or delete an existing local
      `raw/` artifact, and I did not add a raw binary to Git history.
- [ ] Any evidence-release change preserves exact bytes, checksum and
      artifact-specific rights metadata.
- [ ] I reviewed privacy, re-identification, sensitivity, dual-use, and
      redistribution risk; this pull request contains no sensitive report.
- [ ] I have the right to submit my original contribution under CC BY 4.0 and
      identified any separately licensed third-party material.
- [ ] `python3 tools/check.py` and `git diff --check` pass, or I explain below
      exactly what I could not run.

## Validation notes

Record rendered-page review, check output limitations, and any follow-up work.
